title: urophyllum leucophlaeum
intro: Urophyllum leucophlaeum, also known as the white-flowered Urophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Urophyllum leucophlaeum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
